mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply(replyno, boardno, memberno, content, rdate) VALUES(reply_seq.nextval, #{boardno}, #{memberno}, #{content}, sysdate)
mapper.select: SELECT replyno, boardno, memberno, content, rdate FROM reply WHERE boardno = #{boardno} ORDER BY replyno DESC

SELECT r.replyno, r.boardno, r.memberno, r.content, TO_CHAR(r.rdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS rdate, -- Oracle 기준 m.id, m.nickname, m.profile FROM reply r INNER JOIN member m ON r.memberno = m.memberno WHERE r.boardno = #{boardno} ORDER BY r.replyno DESC
